docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,141.77 FILED BY STANDARD RENT A CAR, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LOYOLA, PAULO DEPERIO (MINOR) DEPERIO-BUTCHER, PETRONILA STARR, FRANCIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C

CIVIL SUBPENA AD TO FRANCIS STARR POS FILED.
CIVIL SUBPENA AS TO CLYDARIZA FAED POS FILED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANDARD RENT A CAR, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOYOLA, PAULO DEPERIO (MINOR) DEPERIO-BUTCHER, PETRONILA $3,141.77 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,221.77, DEFT. STARR DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
